title: Phularwan Heat Wave
lead: Phularwan is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.69. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Phularwan is extremely rare, with a Z-Score of +4.69 indicating a significant deviation from normal temperatures. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 15.4 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, highlighting the intense heat. 
 The relative humidity is at 49% and the wind speed is at 3.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures in Phularwan.
